package service

import (
	"context"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"

	"github.com/msk-mind/local-ai-broker/broker/pkg/config"
	"github.com/msk-mind/local-ai-broker/broker/pkg/types"
)

func defaultBrokerExcludedDirs() []string {
	return []string{
		".git",
		".broker",
		"__pycache__",
		".pytest_cache",
		".mypy_cache",
		".ruff_cache",
		".tox",
		".venv",
		"venv",
		"env",
		"node_modules",
		"site-packages",
		"build",
		"dist",
	}
}
